fields.trading_as: BOSS D trading as KeyGuy Centurion
fields.hero_subtext: Professional mobile car key programming, replacement, cutting and diagnostics across Centurion & Pretoria. On your doorstep — no towing, no dealership.
fields.meta_title: KeyGuy Boss D | Mobile Car Key Programming, Replacement & Diagnostics
fields.meta_description: Mobile car key programming, replacement, cutting and diagnostics in Centurion and Pretoria. Fast on-site help for all makes and models. Call or WhatsApp 084 815 7329.

fields.title: Key Replacement
fields.description: Lost or completely broken keys replaced on-site. We carry blanks for most makes and models, cut and program them right at your location.

fields.title: Key Programming
fields.description: Transponders, smart keys, remote head keys and proximity fobs programmed to your vehicle's ECU. Tested and verified before we leave.

fields.title: Key Cutting
fields.description: Precision cutting for replacement keys and duplicates. Standard, laser-cut and high-security key profiles cut with professional equipment.

fields.title: Mobile Diagnostics
fields.description: On-site fault code scanning and vehicle diagnostics. We come to your location to identify electrical issues, immobiliser faults and key-related problems.

fields.title: Key Repair
fields.description: Broken key shells, faulty buttons and damaged remote housings repaired or replaced on-site — cheaper than a full replacement when the electronics are intact.

fields.title: Spare Keys
fields.description: Get a spare cut and programmed while we are on-site. Avoid being stranded — a spare key costs far less than an emergency call-out.

fields.body: Locked out at 7am before work. KeyGuy Boss D was on-site within 45 minutes, had a new key cut and programmed in under an hour. Incredibly professional and much cheaper than the dealership quoted.
Lost both keys for my BMW X3. The dealership wanted a fortune and a 3-day wait. KeyGuy came to my office in Pretoria East and sorted it in 90 minutes. Will definitely use again.
Quick, honest, and knowledgeable. He diagnosed the fault on my Audi key remote, fixed it on-site, and charged a very fair price. No upselling, no drama. Highly recommended.

fields.question: Do you work on all car makes and models?
fields.answer: Yes. We cover VW, Toyota, BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Renault, Nissan, Mazda and more. Call us with your make, model and year and we will confirm before coming out.

fields.question: How quickly can you get to me?
fields.answer: Response time depends on your location and current workload. Call or WhatsApp for an honest ETA — we never give false promises.

fields.question: Do I need to tow my car to you?
fields.answer: No. We come to you — home, office, shopping centre or roadside. Our van is fully equipped to handle the job on-site.

fields.question: How much does it cost?
fields.answer: Pricing depends on the service and your vehicle. We quote upfront — no surprises, no hidden call-out fees. Our prices are significantly lower than dealership rates.

fields.question: Can you make a key if I have lost all copies?
fields.answer: In most cases, yes. We can originate a new key by cutting to code and programming it to your vehicle. Proof of ownership required.

fields.question: Do you offer mobile diagnostics?
fields.answer: Yes. We come to your location with a professional diagnostic scanner to read fault codes, identify immobiliser issues and advise on next steps — all without you needing to visit a workshop.
